note: Vendored, hash-pinned copy of the WHOLE Token Accessibility suite from bounded-systems/conformance-kit main (PR #25 — typography / target-size / opacity-contrast / pairing / likeness + the unified ck-token-a11y runner, built on the palette gate from PR #19). Re-pinned from main, replacing the prior PR #19 palette-gate-only pin. Mirrors the site-side vendor pattern (bdelanghe/site vendor/conformance-kit/provenance.json). Verified against these hashes before use: `npm run token-a11y:verify` (also runs in the token-a11y CI workflow). Zero-dependency, pure/offline — no network, no browser. The members import shared colour-science / APCA / CIEDE2000 primitives from gates/palette-gate.mjs, so every member file must sit together in gates/.
